hero.title: Create With Us
hero.subtitle: Join our community of home decor creators and share the beauty of custom window treatments with your audience. Get free products, earn commissions, and inspire others.

benefits.title: Free Products
benefits.description: Receive complimentary custom curtains for your home or projects valued up to $1,000

benefits.title: Commission
benefits.description: Earn 15% commission on every sale made through your unique referral link

benefits.title: Exclusive Access
benefits.description: Early access to new collections and limited edition fabrics before public launch

benefits.title: Featured Content
benefits.description: Get featured on our official Instagram and website reaching 500K+ followers

requirements: Minimum 10,000 followers on Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube
Active posting schedule with consistent engagement
Content focused on home decor, interior design, or lifestyle
Authentic voice that resonates with your audience
Willingness to create at least 2 pieces of content per quarter

processSteps.title: Apply
processSteps.description: Fill out our simple application form with your social media handles and content samples

processSteps.title: Review
processSteps.description: Our team reviews your application and audience alignment within 5-7 business days

processSteps.title: Welcome
processSteps.description: Receive your welcome package with product selection guide and brand guidelines

processSteps.title: Create
processSteps.description: Receive your custom curtains and start creating beautiful content for your audience

featuredCreators.name: Sarah Mitchell
featuredCreators.quote: LuxDrape transformed my living room. The quality is unmatched!

featuredCreators.name: James Chen
featuredCreators.quote: My followers love seeing these custom curtains in my designs

featuredCreators.name: Emma Wilson
featuredCreators.quote: The commission program has been a great addition to my income

faqs.q: Is there a minimum contract period?
faqs.a: No, our partnership is flexible. However, we do ask that you complete at least one collaboration within 3 months of acceptance to remain active.

faqs.q: How and when do I get paid commissions?
faqs.a: Commissions are paid monthly via PayPal or direct deposit once you reach a $50 minimum threshold.

faqs.q: Can I choose which products to feature?
faqs.a: Yes! Once approved, you will have access to our product catalog and can select items that best fit your aesthetic and audience.

faqs.q: Do I need to make a certain number of posts?
faqs.a: We ask for at least 2 posts per quarter, but many of our partners choose to post more frequently because they genuinely love the products.
